N0410C_ANTIDPRSNT_DAY_NUM N0410C_ANTIDPRSNT_DAY_NUM N0410C Medications Received: Antidepressant Number Days CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received antidepressant medication in the past seven days or since admission/reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information effective 4/01/2012
discontinued 9/30/2023
